case_title: T-C 888 BRANNAN OWNER LLC, VS. NESHIAN MERIC ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF T-C 888 BRANNAN OWNER LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERIC, NESHIAN , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA NSM DESIGN $20,240.80 PRINCIPAL, $2,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $448.02 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,038.82, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-14-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT NESHIAN MERIC ON NOV-16-2021 - CONTINUED TO JAN-19-2022 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 FOR FURTHER OEX AND POSSIBLE MOTION TO COMPEL BY PLAINTIFF T-C 888 BRANNAN OWNER LLC. STEPHAN MAKINO, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF T-C 888 BRANNAN OWNER LLC. DEFENDANT NESHIAN MERIC WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. OEX PERSONALLY SERVED ON MR. MERIC ON 09/26/2021. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF T-C 888 BRANNAN OWNER LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MERIC, NESHIAN , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA NSM DESIGN OEX HEARING SET FOR NOV-16-2021 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF T-C 888 BRANNAN OWNER LLC, NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT RIGHT TO ATTACH IS APPLICABLE IN THIS CASE GIVEN ITS PROCEDURAL POSTURE. AS TO THE ALTERNATIVE RELIEF REQUESTED IN THE LAST PARAGRAPH OF MAKINO DECLARATION, SUCH RELIEF IS DENIED. IT IS NOT SUPPORTED BY AUTHORITY AND THERE APPEARS TO BE NO NOTICE TO THE SHERRIFF. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Application And Hearing For (Applications)
Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Steven Makino, 408.286.5100 of Pahl & McCay appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff T-C 888 Brannon Owner LLL.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF T-C 888 BRANNAN OWNER LLC, Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right to Attach Order is DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that right to attach is applicable in this case given its procedural posture. As to the alternative relief requested in the last paragraph of Makino Declaration, such relief is denied. It is not supported by authority and there appears to be no notice to the Sherriff. Moving party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Application And Hearing For (Applications)
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Continued To Jun-29-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF T-C 888 BRANNAN OWNER LLC'S Application And Hearing.

Transferred to department 501 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on June 29, 2022. That department handles breach of lease actions per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
